title: RegionGeometryMessage
description: A region's polygon, published by a worker to RabbitMQ on routing key country.{CODE}.geometry. The backend upserts it into the `geometries` collection. Geometry is published separately from indicator data and is decoupled from `period`, so large polygons are never duplicated across years. Published rarely — boundaries almost never change.

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, e.g. BR

level.description: Administrative division level name, e.g. UF or municipio

code.description: Region code at this level, e.g. 35

parent_code.description: Parent region code (e.g. the UF code for a municipio), or null at the top level

name.description: Full display name of the region in its native language, e.g. São Paulo

abbrev.description: Short display code where one exists, e.g. SP. Null if not applicable.
